songs.title: DASA Theme-Song_Saved To serve
songs.lyrics:
Verse 1
Once there was a call made many years ago 
A call to serve, a call to rise up and go
A call to tell of amazing grace 
To tell of heaven, a blessed place
A call to young people to rise up

We answer to the call from heaven above
To serve with faith, to serve with joy and love 
To share of amazing Grace
How Christ came down and took my place 
And for this very reason I’ll rise up 

Chorus
To sing the song of the Lamb
Who took away my sins
I am saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)
I am saved to serve, saved to serve 

Verse 2
Our Hearts, Our Souls, our lives we offer you 
This world, this life, this school, we’re passing through 
Many have come and gone before
Many more will stand here, and in choir 
Proclaim your grace and goodness forever 

Chorus
To sing the song of the Lamb
Who took away our sins
We are saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)
We are saved to serve, saved to serve 

Bridge
Hallelujah! King forever
Hallelujah! King forever
Hallelujah! King forever
Hallelujah! King forever

Chorus
To sing the song of the Lamb
Who took away our sins
We are saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)
We are saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)
